content: Hi. I notice in this PR, if we want to use work_struct in the rust, we initial the lock_class_key in the rust side rather in the C side. I am curious why are we doing this?
because we want everything initialized all together, otherwise we got a half-initialized work item?
also key is a static variable, if you make __INIT_WORK() as a function, it just doesn’t work
because lockdep requires different __INIT_WORK() callsite to have different keys
Thanks for the explanation! I got it.
Hongyu Li has marked this topic as resolved.
